name: coralogix/opentelemetry-skills
summary: OpenTelemetry Collector deployment, instrumentation (Java/Python/Node.js/.NET/Go), and OTTL pipeline transforms for Coralogix — coralogix exporter config, Helm chart selection, Kubernetes topology, ECS/EKS/GKE deployments, SDK setup, APM transactions, and OTTL cardinality/PII/routing.
